godot_hook_investigation.note: Investigation only; external/godot-master is NOT modified. Paths and functions are recorded for the deferred patch 0017 call-site gate and the patch 0018 native-handle mapping.

effect_class.native_pass_shape: single compute resolve dispatch (local_size 8x8x1, compute_list_dispatch_threads(resolution.x, resolution.y, 1)); history maintained by three physical copy_to_rect calls (resolve->temp->internal->history, velocity->prev_velocity) outside the resolve dispatch

call_sites.note: deferred patch 0017 would gate the resolve dispatch; the native resolve + history copy chain is always preserved as fallback/continuation.

descriptor_mapping.dst_shape: output extent == color extent (1:1 full-resolution resolve pass; same rule as GRX-010 tonemap)

supported_math_subset.group_shared_tile: 10x10 tile (8x8 group + 1 border) caching clamped color+depth loads
supported_math_subset.velocity: get_closest_pixel_velocity_3x3 (3x3 min-depth velocity poll, with the native border-offset quirk reproduced)
supported_math_subset.history_sampling: 9-tap Catmull-Rom; hardware bilinear textureLod reproduced as explicit float 4-tap Load bilinear with clamp addressing
supported_math_subset.history_clipping: variance clip box (clip_aabb + adaptive box_size from velocity length + variance_dynamic)
supported_math_subset.blend: Reinhard domain lerp (base 1/16 + out-of-screen reset + disocclusion boost + luminance-diff flicker suppression) then inverse Reinhard
supported_math_subset.precision: float32 kernel; parity and dispatch smoke use float32 textures

known_gaps: hardware bilinear (textureLod with a linear+clamp sampler) reproduced as explicit float 4-tap Load bilinear; interior UVs are texel-exact, real-sampler sub-texel fixed-point rounding is a recorded gap
rgba16f / rg16f half storage quantization not modelled (kernel computes float32; native buffers are half)
history physical maintenance chain (resolve->temp->internal->history via three copy_to_rect) not wired (single resolve dispatch only; native continuation maintains history every frame)
one-frame latency (a self-queue dispatch reads the previous frame's color/velocity); a true replacement needs draw_graph integration (deferred), so this slice only scaffolds the writeback
get_closest_pixel_velocity_3x3 border-offset quirk (velocity fetched at group_top_left+min_pos = pos_screen-1+offset) reproduced faithfully
imageLoad out-of-bounds returns 0 (native Vulkan semantics) reproduced by Load OOB=0
no temporal/noise stability evidence (GRX-012 plan note; 4g-level, later slice)
GPU-side math parity observation pending a real dispatch (math_parity_evidence.json)

compile_blockers.summary: the canonical taa_resolve package is the owner-approved hlsl_bridge_workaround artifact (DXC cs_6_0 container validated by dxv, per-slot texture2d/rwtexture2d binding kinds, Rurix-owned RTS0; GRX-009 texture_artifact_provenance_policy.json applies to every texture compute pass); a rurixc-owned taa_resolve compile still requires a patched llc that supports texture intrinsics plus multi-channel texture element support in the Rurix Texture2D<F>/RWTexture2D<F> lang items

implementation_status.runtime_state_note: The DEFAULT runtime path stays fallback-only: with all per-pass settings at their false defaults the bridge still returns RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK for RXGD_PASS_TAA_RESOLVE and the native Godot TAA resolve renders. real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the strict MEASURED success of the opt-in real-pass arm (dispatch_real_pass under a d3d12-recording-shim bridge on the 0001..0022 scratch build); it is not a default enablement and carries no performance claim. The shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, and the patch 0019 result writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot TAA resolve stays the continuation/backstop and re-resolves every view plus maintains the resolve->temp->internal->history physical copy chain every frame, so the candidate temporal sequence cannot change and no net benefit exists yet). No estimated taa_resolve GPU time is attributed.
implementation_status.bridge_gate: src/rurix-godot TaaResolveGate: preflight (int64 cap, 6 texture resources, 28-byte b0, dims match, 1:1 output shape) -> dispatch eligibility (RXGD_CAP_TAA_RESOLVE_REAL_PASS opt-in, non-null native handles, TaaResolveDispatchPackage layout/digest match vs offline evidence) -> per-slot kernel-binding-kind conformance ([texture2d x5, rwtexture2d]) -> math-parity gate (taa_resolve_cpu_reference_proven_pending_gpu_dispatch) -> real dispatch only under the d3d12-recording-shim feature; every failure records a fallback reason and prints the once-per-session RXGD_TAA_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED diagnostic
implementation_status.godot_module_patch: spike/godot-rurix/patches/0017-rurix-accel-taa-resolve-pass-gate-and-callsite.patch (stacked on 0001..0016; default-false rendering/rurix_accel/passes/taa_resolve/enabled setting, try_record_taa_resolve() module gate, default-false virtual D3D12Hooks::try_record_taa_resolve(), and the TAA branch call-site opt-in gate in render_forward_clustered.cpp; the native taa->process is always preserved as fallback/continuation). The runtime native-handle binding is patch 0018-rurix-accel-taa-resolve-runtime-resource-binding.patch and the recording-smoke + real-pass opt-in arms are patch 0019-rurix-accel-taa-resolve-recording-smoke-and-real-pass-optin.patch

wired_call_sites.note: opt-in gate calls D3D12Hooks::try_record_taa_resolve() before the native taa->process, guarded by rb->has_texture(taa, history) so the history slice is allocated (patch 0017/0018; applyability verified via git apply --check on a scratch copy)

standalone_d3d12_dispatch_smoke.purpose: Prove the tracked offline taa_resolve DXIL container + RTS0 root signature + descriptor layout can complete one minimal compute dispatch on a real D3D12 device/command queue with 5 SRVs (t0..t4) + 1 UAV (u0) AND that every measured GPU output texel matches the CPU reference (single-frame TAA resolve on a deterministic synthetic fixture) within tolerance. Standalone measured evidence only; the bridge records no dispatch and returns no OK.
does_not_imply: Godot runtime TAA resolve pass completion
any visual diff, measured fallback telemetry, temporal stability, or performance claim

real_pass_measured_success.real_gpu_pass_scope: opt_in_only: the measured real dispatch requires the default-false dispatch_real_pass arm plus a d3d12-recording-shim bridge DLL; the default runtime path stays fallback-only and the shipping feature-off bridge fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked
real_pass_measured_success.pass_enable_matrix: three legs measured on the 0001..0022 scratch build: disabled_default (reference) / enabled_real_pass_optin (candidate, real_pass_marker + writeback_marker observed) / forced_capability_downgrade (RXGD_TAA_REAL_PASS_BLOCKED first_missing_prerequisite=runtime_binding_preflight_failed fallback_reason=unsupported_device)
real_pass_measured_success.temporal_evidence: GRX_PLAN temporal DoD: a contiguous 8-frame sequence (never a single screenshot) captured per leg; the candidate/forced sequences are frame-for-frame bit-exact to the reference sequence (temporal LDR max_abs=0/mean_abs=0 at every captured frame) because the writeback is a scaffold and the native continuation renders, while the reference sequence carries real inter-frame motion (nonzero_delta_pairs=7/7) so the temporal evidence is meaningful
real_pass_measured_success.ldr_visual_gate: max_abs=0 / mean_abs=0 at every captured frame (candidate is bit-exact to the reference sequence because the writeback is a scaffold and the native taa->process continuation still renders and maintains history)
real_pass_measured_success.shim_note: the d3d12-recording-shim typed_view_format mapping was extended to resolve the Godot TAA depth buffer's combined depth-stencil typeless families (R32G8X24_TYPELESS / R24G8_TYPELESS) to their depth-plane SRV read formats so the six-resource TAA record dispatch completes instead of fail-closing on the depth SRV

remaining_segments: history double-buffer copy-back / prev_velocity bookkeeping and the draw_graph one-frame-latency true replacement (the writeback is a single-view resolve scaffold; the native taa->process maintains history)
hardware-sampler sub-texel rounding true replacement, rgba16f/rg16f half storage quantization parity, multiview
raster/compute resolve seam design or native-continuation retirement (net-benefit measurement)
per-pass FPS baseline comparison (contract requires >= 0.95x baseline before any default-enable discussion)

evidence_requirements.visual: in-engine LDR absolute diff (GRX-009 segment 4g template) is a later slice; not produced here
evidence_requirements.perf: reuse GRX-006 baseline/perf gate; no perf improvement claimed

disclaimer: GRX-012 taa_resolve is closed out at the stage-A5-equivalent level (mirroring GRX-011 ssao_blur): the taa_resolve pass contract, the DXC/DXV/RTS0 offline kernel package (hlsl_bridge_workaround provenance, runtime-mappable per the owner-approved GRX-009 texture artifact provenance policy), the fail-closed bridge TaaResolveGate (default RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK; opt-in RXGD_CAP_TAA_RESOLVE_REAL_PASS arm), the Godot patch stack 0001..0022 (patches 0017-0019: per-pass settings default false + call-site opt-in gate + runtime native-handle binding + recording-smoke/real-pass opt-in; native taa->process always preserved), the standalone real D3D12 dispatch smoke, and the gated real-pass enablement gate that recorded a strict MEASURED success with the GRX_PLAN temporal DoD (real_pass_enablement_success_evidence.json, strict_success=true; a contiguous 8-frame sequence captured per leg, candidate frame-for-frame bit-exact to the reference sequence). implemented=true / real_gpu_pass=true / real_d3d12_dispatch_recorded=true record the MEASURED opt-in real-pass arm only. The DEFAULT path stays fallback-only, default_enable_state stays disabled per the owner decision (real_pass_default_enable_decision.json, keep_default_disabled), the shipping feature-off bridge still fails closed with real_dispatch_path_not_linked, the patch 0019 writeback is a SCAFFOLD (native Godot TAA resolve continuation/backstop re-resolves and maintains history every frame; candidate sequence bit-exact), and NO visual-superiority, temporal-stability, GPU-timestamp, FPS, or performance improvement is claimed.
